2606.16211.title: Weaving Multi-Source Evidence for Biomedical Reasoning: The BioMedHop Benchmark and BioWeave Framework
2606.16211.paper_summary: Biomedical question answering (QA) increasingly requires reasoning over interacting entities, where supporting evidence is scattered across biomedical knowledge graphs, literature documents, and web-accessible resources. However, existing biomedical QA benchmarks mainly focus on exam-style knowledge, literature comprehension, or short-range multi-hop inference, leaving source-conditioned graph reasoning and evidence topology construction underexplored. To fill this gap, we introduce BioMedHop, a multi-source graph-grounded benchmark for evaluating biomedical reasoning over structured evidence topologies. BioMedHop contains 10,045 instances across KG, document, web, and hybrid evidence settings, covering shared-neighbor matching, intersection reasoning, path-based reasoning, and counting, with option-based, open-ended, and numeric count renderings. To support this benchmark, we further propose BioWeave, a source-aware reasoning framework that retrieves biomedical KG paths, gathers supporting clues from documents and web sources, assembles them into a unified evidence graph, and verifies answers through entity-level evidence support. Comprehensive experiments show that BioWeave achieves the best overall performance among compared methods on BioMedHop, outperforming the strong hybrid baseline ToG-2 by 10.5% in the overall average. Moreover, BioWeave consistently improves different LLM backbones and enables smaller models, such as Qwen3-4B, to achieve reasoning performance comparable to GPT-4-Turbo.
2606.16211.paper_summary_zh: 生物醫學問答（QA）越來越需要對互動實體進行推理，而支持證據散佈在生物醫學知識圖譜、文獻文件和可網絡訪問的資源中。<lb/>然而，現有的生物醫學QA基準主要集中在考試風格的知識、文獻理解或短距離多跳推理上，對於源條件圖推理和證據拓撲構建的研究仍然不足。<lb/>為了填補這一空白，我們介紹了BioMedHop，一個基於多源圖的基準，用於評估基於結構化證據拓撲的生物醫學推理。<lb/>BioMedHop包含10,045個實例，涵蓋KG、文檔、網絡和混合證據設置，涉及共享鄰居匹配、交集推理、基於路徑的推理和計數，並提供基於選項、開放式和數字計數的呈現方式。<lb/>為了支持這一基準，我們進一步提出了BioWeave，一個源感知推理框架，該框架檢索生物醫學KG路徑，從文檔和網絡資源中收集支持線索，將其組裝成統一的證據圖，並通過實體級證據支持來驗證答案。<lb/>全面的實驗顯示，BioWeave在BioMedHop上相比其他方法達到了最佳整體性能，整體平均表現超過強大的混合基線ToG-2達10.5%。<lb/>此外，BioWeave持續改善不同的LLM主幹，並使得較小的模型，如Qwen3-4B，能夠達到與GPT-4-Turbo相當的推理性能。
2606.16211.author: Xingyu Tan et.al.
2606.16211.authors: Xingyu Tan, Shiyuan Liu, Xiaoyang Wang, Qing Liu, Xiwei Xu, Xin Yuan, Liming Zhu, Wenjie Zhang
